description: Legal/privacy complaint invoking GDPR and right-to-be-forgotten (T12 / LEGAL_PRIVACY_OR_COMPLAINT). Matched deterministically by det-legal-001. Always enters REVIEW_HOLD with legal_review_required and privacy_review_required true and a durable ORGANISATION_DNC suppression intent; no automated reply.

input.reply_subject: Re: Quick question about your sales pipeline
input.reply_text: Under GDPR, I am exercising my right to be forgotten. Where did you get my email address? Please confirm you have deleted all my personal data.
input.reply_text_snippet: Under GDPR, I am exercising my right to be forgotten. Where did you get my email address?

expected.notes: det-legal-001 matches 'gdpr', 'right to be forgotten', and 'where did you get my email'. Section C's LEGAL_PRIVACY_OR_COMPLAINT override sets legal_review_required=true and privacy_review_required=true (both driven by det-legal-001), reputational_review_required stays false (det-regulator-001 and det-complaint-001 are false), durable_dnc_intent=true and address_suppression_intent=ORGANISATION_DNC because det-legal-001 is true. review_hold=true and terminal_status=REVIEW_HOLD are set unconditionally for this category by BASE_PLANS. All suppression/DNC fields are intents only - external_action_status remains NOT_PERFORMED.
